positive: A stylized, celestial geometry pattern featuring glowing nebulas, interlocking mandalas, and stylized bioluminescent flora. The main subject is a central vortex of cosmic energy depicted with crisp, clean lines and high contrast. Use a deep indigo and sapphire blue color palette accented by vibrant gold and electric cyan glowing details. The composition must be highly symmetrical, suitable for a repeating print on clothing, with strong, clear silhouettes and minimal gradients for print accuracy. Artwork should resemble a modern, detailed etching combined with deep space aesthetics. Studio shot, volumetric lighting, vector illustration style, ultra-detailed, highly stylized, centered composition.
